==[[File:White Bead.png|75px]]White Bead Rewards==
{|class="wikitable"
!colspan="2"|Reward
!rowspan="2"|Rate
|-
!Image!!Name
|-
|[[File:B-Tadpole.png|50px]]||B-Tadpole||56.18%
|-
|[[File:Flower_Crown.png|50px]]||Flower Crown||1.12%
|-
|[[File:Wooden_Ring.png|50px]]||Wooden Ring||1.12%
|-
|[[File:Iron_Ring.png|50px]]||Iron Ring||1.12%
|-
|[[File:Beast_Fang.png|50px]]||Beast Fang||1.12%
|}
